# Booking CMS — LLM / AI agent context
# Scope: https://bilohash.com/booking/ only

> Booking CMS — universal PHP online booking script from Norway: hotels, rentals, doctor & dentist appointments, beauty salons and more. Multilingual frontend, Schema.org markup, admin panel and JSON. Booking.com-style demo — the same engine for any reservation workflow. Markets: Norway (NO), Europe (EN), Ukraine (UA), Sweden (SV).

## Product
- Name: Booking CMS
- Version: 1.2.0 (2026-07-05) — same on /booking/site/ and /booking/admin/
- Base URL: https://bilohash.com/booking/
- Type: PHP 8+ online booking / reservation script (no framework)
- Storage: JSON files under /booking/data/
- Languages: Norwegian (default), English, Swedish, Ukrainian, Russian

## Public URLs (/booking/)
- Home / search: https://bilohash.com/booking/
- Property detail: https://bilohash.com/booking/property.php?id={id}
- Search results: https://bilohash.com/booking/search.php
- Contact: https://bilohash.com/booking/contact.php
- Product page: https://bilohash.com/booking/site/
- Solutions hub: https://bilohash.com/booking/solutions.php
- SEO verticals: /booking/hotell-overnatting/, /booking/leiebolig/, /booking/legetime/, /booking/tannlege/, /booking/skjonnhetssalong/, /booking/spa-massasje/, /booking/trening-kurs/, /booking/utstyrutleie/
- Sitemap: https://bilohash.com/booking/sitemap.php
- Launch news: https://bilohash.com/news/booking-cms.html

## Admin (/booking/admin/)
- Login: https://bilohash.com/booking/admin/login.php
- Demo credentials: demo / bilobook2026
- Dashboard, properties, bookings, guest reviews moderation
- Settings: Appearance (colours + footer), reCAPTCHA v2, AI chat (Grok xAI / OpenAI GPT)
- Settings stored in /booking/data/settings.json

## Features
- Property search with filters (destination, dates, type, price)
- 10 demo properties (Norway, Ukraine, Lithuania, Europe)
- Property page tabs: overview, facilities (amenities), guest reviews + public review form
- Guest review moderation in admin (approve, hide, delete, add)
- Theme settings: primary colour, buttons, hover, footer background, optional page background
- reCAPTCHA on contact, booking and review forms (step-by-step admin instructions, 4 languages)
- Optional floating AI chat widget with system instructions
- Schema.org, Open Graph, hreflang (no, en, uk, ru), responsive frontend
- Multilingual admin panel (NO, EN, UA, RU)

## Commercial intent
- Order custom booking website development (Norway / remote)
- PHP booking script with admin panel and multilingual frontend
- Hotels, clinics, salons, rentals — white-label ready

## Tech notes
- PHP 8+, no framework
- Demo storage: JSON files (properties.json, bookings.json, reviews.json, settings.json)
- Production option: MySQL / MariaDB backend instead of JSON (available on request / custom deploy)
- Extensible: payment gateways (Stripe, Vipps), white-label deploy
- Contact for licensing / customisation: https://bilohash.com/booking/contact.php
